author: haresh talatia
text: For my father's cancer treatment by the grace of God we reached to Dr.Mohanty Sir, were he treated my father very patiently, kindly, thoroughly, and accurately and made my father cancer free. I strongly recommend him for the perfect radiation therapy and the best teeatment.

author: Jignesh Butani
text: One of the best doctor with best patient service and very patient centric service provided. Patient care was the top priority of the doctor and all staff.

author: Bhavesh Soni
text: My relative rameshbhai barbhaya need treatment so we reached at dr sarthakji who is very good doctor with have pure heart toward patients and the way dr help us its feel like we are blessed at this situation when we feel hopeless... thank you sir for everything you done for us... You make us to believe in you as a good humanity... thank you so much 🙏🙏🙏

author: Harshad Bhimani
text: We have taken only five radiation suggested by Dr.Mohany sir against 25 normally given. We find best result with only five radiation. Now there is a no problem. I suggest all of suffering from breast cancer pl visit Dr. Mohanty sir once. Sterling Hospital Rajkot

author: Zala Kelvin
text: Highly professional radiation oncology services provided by Dr. Sarthak Mohanty. Extremely supportive team.

author: Jaydev Zala
text: Best radiation oncologist in Rajkot. Very good behavior with patients.

author: GURUKRUPA steel arvind
text: Good hospital and medical facilities for cancer treatment.

author: Ashish Jobanputra
text: Dr. Sarthak has treated my 12 year old daughter. He made her comfortable during radiation. Very supportive and helpful in nature with great knowledge .His staff is also very kind. Highly recommend him. We need more doctor like him.

author: Anzil Sarasan
text: Excellent care and friendly support from the doctor and nurses.

author: prakash patel
text: Dr.sarthak mohanty treat patients is very friendly.. really visionary doctor....

author: Sheeja James
text: A very supportive and understanding person as a Doctor

author: mahendersingh valecha
text: My mother in law's cancer was treated with a lot of care by Dr. Sarthak.

author: Valecha Agyakaur
text: Very helpful doctor, transperant and focussed on patients. Treated my mother's illness very well

author: Manoj Parmar
text: I met a Dr. very kind in nature, as a part of my treatment was Mr. Sarthak Mohanti.... Really I salute him for his kindness, his nature to a patient for his treatment.....

author: Soham Chauhan
text: Thank you Dr. Sarthak Mohanty and staff for the wonderful support and outstanding cancer care treatment.

author: ashish trivedi
text: Highly recommended radiation oncology services. Top class facilities at HCG Rajkot.

author: VISHAL RABADIYA
text: Best radiation oncology doctor in Rajkot city. Very cooperative staff.

author: shakil khira
text: Great dr ...amazing.. down to earth personality...great service ..👌👌

author: ajay gondaliya
text: Highly satisfied with Dr. Sarthak Mohanty's cancer treatment. Humble and professional behavior.

author: RANJAN SOLANKI
text: Proper guidance and supportive staff during radiation therapy.

author: Mitesh Chudasama
text: Very supportive and explain everything. A person with kind heart and mind with deep knowledge. Mental support heals the most and sir done it fith precision.

author: Akash Ganatra
text: Very good oncologist in Rajkot.

author: Kirit Padsala
text: Dr. Sarthak Mohanty is a very kind and verygood doctor. Very good nature, very humble and very careful for patients.Don't incur unnecessary expenses and he Always give true guidance and advice.Not only has he taken great care of my father's health, but also he is lovely to speak with at every appointment. Also he explained everything to me in a very clear manner. He was also kind and friendly completely satisfied with Dr. Sarthak Mohanty. So, I am glad , I choose Dr. Sarthak Mohanty and would highly recommend to anyone.....Doctor Sarthak Saheb, may God continue to heal the sick with the spirit of service to the sick and suffering, and may God keep them and their families healthy.....Kiritbhai Amreli ,Gujrat.

author: mahendra sardhara
text: Excellent radiation therapist and oncologist.

author: Hitesh Gadhvi
text: Very helpful doctor. Clear explanation of cancer treatment plans.

author: Dixa Bhut
text: ✍️✍️Amazing Experience, Dr. Sarthak Mohanty is a great doctor. Very good nature, very humble and very careful for patients. Not only has he taken great care of my father's health, but also he is lovely to speak with at every appointment. Also he explained everything to me in a very clear manner. He was also kind and friendly completely satisfied with Dr. Sarthak Mohanty. So, I am glad , I choose Dr. Sarthak Mohanty and would highly recommend to anyone.....🙏✍️👌 .

author: Hardik Baldha
text: Very humble and very careful for patients

author: Haresh Vekariya
text: Polite behavior and top notch radiation services.

author: Zenith Dudhagara
text: Amazing experience, very good nature

author: Kinjal Ravi
text: one of the most patients supportive doctor i have seen. most preferred doctor for cancer treatment.

author: Hitesh Hitu
text: Great oncologist in Saurashtra region.

author: Rahim H Sumra
text: Dr. Sarthak Mohanty is a very nice human being and a highly skilled radiation oncologist.

author: Pradeep Dangar
text: Wonderful experience with Dr Sarthak sir.... humble person,kind personality, amazing treatment by sir. Thank you very much sir for treatment....
